positive: A vibrant, stylized, symmetrical geometric pattern featuring abstract celestial bodies, interconnected constellations, and stylized lunar cycles. The design should utilize a palette of deep sapphire blue, metallic gold, and cosmic violet. The composition must be highly detailed, scalable, and designed to repeat seamlessly across fabric. Focus on sharp lines, clean silhouettes, and a central, elegant emblem-like structure suitable for a chest print. Style: Art Nouveau meets Cosmic Geometry, vector art, graphic novel aesthetic, high contrast, luminous glow effects, deep space background.
negative: blur, artifacts, grainy, low resolution, watermark, text, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, deformed, noise, out of frame, logos, trademarks, copyright
